# MuPDF.NET

> MuPDF.NET is a high-performance C# library for data extraction, analysis, conversion & manipulation of PDF (and other) documents. It is the official .NET binding for MuPDF from Artifex Software, derived from PyMuPDF and closely following its structure.

MuPDF.NET is available under the Artifex Community License and commercial license agreements.

- NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/packages/MuPDF.NET/
- GitHub: https://github.com/ArtifexSoftware/MuPDF.NET
- Discord: https://artifex.com/discord/artifex
- Forum: https://forum.mupdf.com

> **Note:** MuPDF.NET is derived from PyMuPDF and closely follows its structure. For most PyMuPDF classes, features and functions you will find a respective MuPDF.NET object doing the same thing. Note that object names differ between the two libraries.

---

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

- Microsoft Visual Studio 2019 or later
- .NET (Windows)

### Installation via NuGet

Add the MuPDF.NET package from NuGet to your project. Then reference it in your C# source:

```csharp
using MuPDF.NET;
```

### Hello World Example

```csharp
using MuPDF.NET;

Document doc = new Document();
Page page = doc.NewPage();
string text = "Made with MuPDF.NET";

MuPDF.NET.Font font = new MuPDF.NET.Font("helv"); // Helvetica
MuPDF.NET.TextWriter tw = new MuPDF.NET.TextWriter(page.Rect);
tw.Append(new(50, 100), text, font);
tw.WriteText(page);
doc.Save("hello_world.pdf");
```

### Building from Source

1. Clone the GitHub project: https://github.com/ArtifexSoftware/MuPDF.NET
2. Open `MuPDF.NET.sln` in Visual Studio
3. Set: Release, x64, Build
4. Results: `MuPDF.NET.dll` and `Demo.exe`
5. Required DLLs: `mupdfcpp64.dll` and `mupdfcsharp.dll` (must be in same folder as your project)

### Adobe PDF Reference

The Adobe PDF Reference manual is frequently cited throughout the documentation. Available at: https://opensource.adobe.com/dc-acrobat-sdk-docs/standards/pdfstandards/pdf/PDF32000_2008.pdf

---

## The Basics — Common Tasks

### Supported File Types

MuPDF.NET supports PDF, XPS, EPUB, FB2, CBZ, SVG, and common raster image formats (PNG, JPEG, BMP, GIF, TIFF, etc.).

### Opening a File

```csharp
// From file
Document doc = new Document("sample.pdf");

// From memory
byte[] data = File.ReadAllBytes("sample.pdf");
Document doc = new Document(stream: data, filetype: "pdf");

// New empty PDF
Document doc = new Document();
```

### Extract Text from a PDF

```csharp
Document doc = new Document("sample.pdf");
Page page = doc[0];
string text = page.GetText("text");
Console.WriteLine(text);

// As blocks
foreach (var block in page.GetTextBlocks())
    Console.WriteLine(block.Text);
```

### Extract Images from a PDF

```csharp
Document doc = new Document("sample.pdf");
var images = doc.GetPageImages(0);
foreach (var img in images)
{
    var extracted = doc.ExtractImage(img.Xref);
    File.WriteAllBytes($"image.{extracted["ext"]}", (byte[])extracted["image"]);
}
```

### Extract Vector Graphics

```csharp
Page page = doc[0];
var paths = page.GetDrawings();
```

### Merging PDF Files

```csharp
Document target = new Document();
Document src1 = new Document("file1.pdf");
Document src2 = new Document("file2.pdf");
target.InsertPdf(src1);
target.InsertPdf(src2);
target.Save("merged.pdf");
```

### Adding a Watermark to a PDF

```csharp
Document doc = new Document("input.pdf");
for (int i = 0; i < doc.PageCount; i++)
{
    Page page = doc[i];
    // Use page.InsertText() or page.InsertImage() to add watermark content
}
doc.Save("watermarked.pdf");
```

### Adding Text to a PDF

```csharp
Document doc = new Document("input.pdf");
Page page = doc[0];
MuPDF.NET.Font font = new MuPDF.NET.Font("helv");
TextWriter tw = new TextWriter(page.Rect);
tw.Append(new Point(50, 100), "Hello!", font);
tw.WriteText(page);
doc.Save("output.pdf");
```

### Adding an Image to a PDF

```csharp
Page page = doc[0];
Rect rect = new Rect(100, 100, 300, 300);
page.InsertImage(rect, filename: "image.png");
doc.Save("output.pdf");
```

### Converting a PDF Page to an Image

```csharp
Document doc = new Document("sample.pdf");
Page page = doc[0];
Matrix mat = new Matrix(2, 2); // 2x zoom = 144 DPI
Pixmap pix = page.GetPixmap(matrix: mat);
pix.Save("page.png");
```

### Converting from an Image to a PDF

```csharp
Document doc = new Document();
doc.InsertFile("photo.jpg"); // Appends image as a full page
doc.Save("output.pdf");
```

### Rotating a PDF

```csharp
Page page = doc[0];
page.SetRotation(90); // 90, 180, 270
doc.Save("rotated.pdf");
```

### Cropping a PDF

```csharp
Page page = doc[0];
Rect cropRect = new Rect(50, 50, 400, 600);
page.SetCropBox(cropRect);
doc.Save("cropped.pdf");
```

### Attaching and Embedding Files

```csharp
// Attach file to whole document
doc.AddEmbfile("attachment.txt", File.ReadAllBytes("attachment.txt"),
    filename: "attachment.txt", desc: "My attached file");

// Retrieve embedded files
int count = doc.GetEmbfileCount();
byte[] content = doc.GetEmbfile(0);
```

### Deleting Pages

```csharp
doc.DeletePage(0);               // Delete page 0
doc.DeletePages(2, 5);           // Delete pages 2 through 5
doc.DeletePages(new List<int>{ 1, 3, 7 }); // Delete specific pages
```

### Re-Arranging and Copying Pages

```csharp
doc.MovePage(3, to: 0);          // Move page 3 to front
doc.CopyPage(0, to: -1);         // Copy page 0 to end
doc.CopyFullPage(0, to: 1);      // Full duplicate of page 0 inserted at position 1
```

### Selecting a Subset of Pages

```csharp
// Keep only pages 0, 2, 4 (even pages)
doc.Select(new List<int> { 0, 2, 4 });
doc.Save("even_pages.pdf");
```

### Adding Blank Pages

```csharp
Page page = doc.NewPage(-1, width: 595, height: 842); // A4
```

### Inserting Pages with Text Content

```csharp
doc.InsertPage(0, text: "Cover page", fontName: "helv", fontFile: null, fontSize: 24);
```

### Splitting Single Pages

```csharp
// Split page 0 into left and right halves
Page page = doc[0];
Rect full = page.Rect;
Rect left = new Rect(full.X0, full.Y0, full.X1 / 2, full.Y1);
Rect right = new Rect(full.X1 / 2, full.Y0, full.X1, full.Y1);
// Use SetCropBox on copies for each half
```

### PDF Encryption & Decryption

```csharp
// Save with encryption
doc.Save("secure.pdf",
    encryption: PDF_ENCRYPT_AES_256,
    ownerPW: "ownerpass",
    userPW: "userpass",
    permissions: PDF_PERM_PRINT | PDF_PERM_COPY);

// Authenticate an encrypted document
Document doc = new Document("secure.pdf");
if (doc.NeedsPass)
    doc.Authenticate("userpass");
```

### Getting Page Links

```csharp
Page page = doc[0];
List<Link> links = page.GetLinks();
foreach (var link in links)
    Console.WriteLine(link.Uri);
```

### Getting All Annotations from a Document

```csharp
for (int i = 0; i < doc.PageCount; i++)
{
    Page page = doc[i];
    foreach (var annot in page.GetAnnots())
        Console.WriteLine($"Page {i}: {annot.Type} - {annot.Info["content"]}");
}
```

### Redacting Content from a PDF

```csharp
Page page = doc[0];
Rect redactRect = new Rect(100, 200, 300, 220);
page.AddRedactAnnot(redactRect);
page.ApplyRedactions(); // Permanently removes content
doc.Save("redacted.pdf");
```

### Working with Barcodes

```csharp
// Reading barcodes
Page page = doc[0];
var barcodes = Utils.ReadBarcodes(page);
foreach (var bc in barcodes)
    Console.WriteLine($"{bc.Format}: {bc.Value}");

// Writing a barcode
Pixmap barcodePixmap = Utils.GetBarcodePixmap("Hello World", BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE, 200, 200);
page.InsertImage(new Rect(50, 50, 250, 250), pixmap: barcodePixmap);
```

### Using Image Filters

```csharp
ImageFilter filter = new ImageFilter(ImageFilter.GRAYSCALE);
ImageFilterPipeline pipeline = new ImageFilterPipeline();
pipeline.Add(filter);
// Apply to pixmaps
```

---

## API Reference

### Document Class

`Document` is the core class. It can be constructed from a file or from memory.

```csharp
// From file
Document doc = new Document("some.pdf");

// Handle wrong extension
doc = new Document("some.file", filetype: "xps");

// From memory (filetype required if not PDF)
doc = new Document(stream: memArea, filetype: "xps");

// New empty PDF
doc = new Document();
```

**Constructor parameters:**
- `filename` (string): file path; document type inferred from extension
- `stream` (byte[]): memory area with document content
- `filetype` (string): e.g. "pdf", "xps", "application/pdf"
- `rect` (Rect): page size for reflowable documents (EPUB, HTML)
- `width`/`height` (float): alternative to rect for reflowable layout
- `fontSize` (float): default font size for reflowable documents

#### Key Document Methods

| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `Document.LoadPage(int pageId)` | Load a Page object (0-based, or negative to count from end) |
| `Document.NewPage(int pno, float width, float height)` | Insert a new empty page |
| `Document.InsertPage(int pno, string text, ...)` | Insert page with text content |
| `Document.DeletePage(int pno)` | Delete a page |
| `Document.DeletePages(...)` | Delete multiple pages |
| `Document.CopyPage(int pno, int to)` | Copy a page reference |
| `Document.CopyFullPage(int pno, int to)` | Duplicate a page (new xref) |
| `Document.MovePage(int pno, int to)` | Move a page |
| `Document.Select(List<int> list)` | Keep only listed page numbers |
| `Document.InsertPdf(Document docsrc, ...)` | Insert pages from another PDF |
| `Document.InsertFile(string infile, ...)` | Insert pages from any supported document |
| `Document.Save(string filename, ...)` | Save the PDF to file |
| `Document.SaveIncremental()` | Save changes incrementally |
| `Document.ToBytes(...)` | Write to byte array |
| `Document.Write()` | Write to byte array (alias) |
| `Document.Convert2Pdf(...)` | Convert any document to PDF in memory |
| `Document.Authenticate(string password)` | Decrypt with password |
| `Document.GetToc(bool simple)` | Get table of contents list |
| `Document.SetToc(List<Toc> tocs, int collapse)` | Replace full TOC |
| `Document.SetTocItem(int idx, ...)` | Update a single TOC entry |
| `Document.DeleteTocItem(int idx)` | Remove a TOC item |
| `Document.GetMetadata(string key)` | Get metadata value |
| `Document.SetMetadata(Dictionary m)` | Set metadata |
| `Document.GetXmlMetadata()` | Get XML metadata |
| `Document.SetXmlMetaData(string metadata)` | Set XML metadata |
| `Document.DeleteXmlMetadata()` | Delete XML metadata |
| `Document.GetPageText(int pno, ...)` | Extract page text by page number |
| `Document.GetPagePixmap(int pno, ...)` | Get page pixmap by page number |
| `Document.GetPageImages(int pno, ...)` | List images referenced by a page |
| `Document.GetPageFonts(int pno, ...)` | List fonts referenced by a page |
| `Document.GetPageXObjects(int pno)` | List XObjects referenced by a page |
| `Document.SearchPageFor(int pno, string text, ...)` | Search for text on a page |
| `Document.AddEmbfile(string name, byte[] buffer, ...)` | Embed a new file |
| `Document.GetEmbfile(int item)` | Retrieve embedded file content |
| `Document.GetEmbfileInfo(dynamic item)` | Metadata of embedded file |
| `Document.GetEmbfileCount()` | Count of embedded files |
| `Document.GetEmbfileNames()` | List of embedded file names |
| `Document.DeleteEmbfile(string item)` | Remove embedded file |
| `Document.Scrub(...)` | Remove sensitive data |
| `Document.Bake(bool annots, bool widgets)` | Convert annotations/widgets to page content |
| `Document.SetPageMode(string value)` | Set PDF PageMode |
| `Document.SetPageLayout(string value)` | Set PDF PageLayout |
| `Document.SetMarkInfo(Dictionary value)` | Set MarkInfo (tagged PDF) |
| `Document.SetPageLabels(string labels)` | Add/update page label definitions |
| `Document.GetPageLabels()` | Get page label definitions |
| `Document.GetPageNumbers(string label, ...)` | Get page numbers matching a label |
| `Document.ResolveNames()` | Convert destination names to dict |
| `Document.ExtractFont(...)` | Extract a font by xref |
| `Document.ExtractImage(...)` | Extract an embedded image by xref |
| `Document.Recolor(int pageNum, ...)` | Recolor a page (GRAY/RGB/CMYK) |
| `Document.GetPages(int start, int stop, int step)` | Iterator over page range |
| `Document.AddOcg(...)` | Add optional content group |
| `Document.AddLayer(...)` | Add optional content layer config |
| `Document.SetLayer(...)` | Permanently set OCG states |
| `Document.SetLayerUIConfig(...)` | Temporarily change OCG visibility |
| `Document.SetOCMD(...)` | Create/update Optional Content Membership Dictionary |
| `Document.JournalEnable()` | Enable journalling |
| `Document.JournalStartOp(...)` | Start a journalled operation |
| `Document.JournalStopOp()` | End a journalled operation |
| `Document.JournalUndo()` | Undo last operation |
| `Document.JournalRedo()` | Redo last undone operation |
| `Document.SubsetFonts()` | Create font subsets |
| `Document.CanSaveIncrementally()` | Check if incremental save is possible |

#### Key Document Attributes

| Attribute | Description |
|---|---|
| `Document.PageCount` | Number of pages |
| `Document.IsClosed` | Whether document is closed |
| `Document.IsDirty` | Whether document has unsaved changes |
| `Document.IsEncrypted` | Whether document is still encrypted |
| `Document.IsPDF` | Whether this is a PDF |
| `Document.IsFormPDF` | Whether this is a Form PDF |
| `Document.IsReflowable` | Whether this is reflowable (EPUB, HTML) |
| `Document.IsRepaired` | Whether this PDF was repaired on open |
| `Document.NeedsPass` | Whether a password is required |
| `Document.MetaData` | Document metadata dictionary |
| `Document.Name` | Document filename |
| `Document.Outline` | First Outline item |
| `Document.Permissions` | Access permissions |
| `Document.PageMode` | PDF PageMode value |
| `Document.PageLayout` | PDF PageLayout value |

#### Document.Save() Options

- `garbage` (0–4): remove unreferenced objects, compact xref, merge duplicates, deduplicate streams
- `clean`: sanitise content streams
- `deflate`: compress streams
- `incremental`: only save changes (incompatible with garbage/linear)
- `linear`: linearise for web access
- `pretty`: prettify source for readability
- `encryption`: `PDF_ENCRYPT_NONE`, `PDF_ENCRYPT_RC4_40`, `PDF_ENCRYPT_RC4_128`, `PDF_ENCRYPT_AES_128`, `PDF_ENCRYPT_AES_256`
- `ownerPW` / `userPW`: password strings (max 40 chars)
- `useObjstms`: compress eligible objects into streams (significant size reduction)

#### Document.Authenticate() Return Codes

- `1`: authenticated, no owner/user passwords in PDF
- `2`: authenticated with user password
- `4`: authenticated with owner password
- `6`: authenticated, both passwords are equal

#### Document.Scrub() Parameters

All are `bool` and default to `true` unless noted:
- `attachedFiles`: remove FileAttachment annotation content
- `cleanPages`: remove comments from page painting sources
- `embeddedFiles`: remove embedded files
- `hiddenText`: remove OCR'd and invisible text
- `javascript`: remove JavaScript
- `metadata`: remove standard PDF metadata
- `redactions`: apply redaction annotations
- `redactImages` (int, default 0): 0=ignore, 1=blank overlap, 2=remove
- `removeLinks`: remove all links
- `resetFields`: reset form fields to defaults
- `resetResponses`: remove annotation responses
- `thumbnails`: remove thumbnail images
- `xmlMetadata`: remove XML metadata

---

### Page Class

`Page` objects are created by `Document.LoadPage()` or `doc[n]`. There is a parent-child relationship: if the document is closed, all Page objects become orphaned.

**Key Page Methods** (see https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Page.html for full reference):

| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `Page.GetPixmap(Matrix matrix, ...)` | Render page to a Pixmap |
| `Page.GetText(string option, ...)` | Extract text ("text", "blocks", "words", "dict", "rawdict", "html", "xhtml", "xml", "json") |
| `Page.GetTextBlocks(...)` | Extract text as list of blocks |
| `Page.GetTextWords(...)` | Extract text as list of words |
| `Page.SearchFor(string text, ...)` | Search for text, returns list of Quads/Rects |
| `Page.GetLinks()` | Get list of links |
| `Page.InsertLink(Link lnk)` | Insert a new link |
| `Page.UpdateLink(Link lnk)` | Update a link |
| `Page.DeleteLink(Link lnk)` | Delete a link |
| `Page.GetAnnots(string annotType)` | Get annotations |
| `Page.AddHighlightAnnot(...)` | Add highlight annotation |
| `Page.AddUnderlineAnnot(...)` | Add underline annotation |
| `Page.AddStrikeoutAnnot(...)` | Add strikeout annotation |
| `Page.AddSquigglyAnnot(...)` | Add squiggly underline |
| `Page.AddTextAnnot(...)` | Add text (sticky note) annotation |
| `Page.AddFreeTextAnnot(...)` | Add free text annotation |
| `Page.AddRectAnnot(...)` | Add rectangle annotation |
| `Page.AddLineAnnot(...)` | Add line annotation |
| `Page.AddPolylineAnnot(...)` | Add polyline annotation |
| `Page.AddPolygonAnnot(...)` | Add polygon annotation |
| `Page.AddInkAnnot(...)` | Add ink annotation |
| `Page.AddStampAnnot(...)` | Add stamp annotation |
| `Page.AddRedactAnnot(...)` | Add redaction annotation |
| `Page.AddFileAnnot(...)` | Add file attachment annotation |
| `Page.ApplyRedactions()` | Apply all redaction annotations |
| `Page.InsertText(...)` | Insert text at a point |
| `Page.InsertTextbox(...)` | Insert text into a rectangle |
| `Page.InsertImage(Rect rect, ...)` | Insert an image |
| `Page.InsertFont(...)` | Insert a font resource |
| `Page.DrawLine(...)` | Draw a line |
| `Page.DrawRect(...)` | Draw a rectangle |
| `Page.DrawCircle(...)` | Draw a circle |
| `Page.DrawBezier(...)` | Draw a Bezier curve |
| `Page.DrawOval(...)` | Draw an oval |
| `Page.ShowPdfPage(...)` | Display another PDF page on this one |
| `Page.GetDisplayList(...)` | Create a DisplayList |
| `Page.GetDrawings()` | Get vector graphics paths |
| `Page.GetFonts(...)` | List fonts used on this page |
| `Page.GetImageBbox(...)` | Get bounding box of an image |
| `Page.GetImageInfo(...)` | Get info on images actually displayed |
| `Page.GetWidgets()` | Get form fields on this page |
| `Page.SetRotation(int rotate)` | Set page rotation |
| `Page.SetCropBox(Rect rect)` | Set crop box |
| `Page.SetMediaBox(Rect rect)` | Set media box |
| `Page.SetBleedBox(Rect rect)` | Set bleed box |
| `Page.SetTrimBox(Rect rect)` | Set trim box |
| `Page.SetArtBox(Rect rect)` | Set art box |
| `Page.WriteText(...)` | Write TextWriter content to page |

**Key Page Properties:**

| Property | Description |
|---|---|
| `Page.Rect` | Page rectangle |
| `Page.MediaBox` | Media box |
| `Page.CropBox` | Crop box |
| `Page.Rotation` | Page rotation (0, 90, 180, 270) |
| `Page.Number` | Page number (0-based) |
| `Page.TransformationMatrix` | Transformation matrix for coordinate conversion |

---

### Pixmap Class

Pixmap objects contain raster image data.

**Supported input image formats:** PNG, JPEG, BMP, GIF, TIFF, PNM, PGM, PBM, PPM, PAM, JBIG2, JXR, JPX, and more.

**Supported output image formats:** PNG, JPEG, PNM, PGM, PBM, PPM, PAM, PSD, PS, PDF (single page).

Key methods:
- `Pixmap.Save(string filename)` — save to file
- `Pixmap.ToBitmap()` — convert to .NET Bitmap
- `Pixmap.Samples` — raw pixel data as byte array
- `Pixmap.Width`, `Pixmap.Height` — dimensions
- `Pixmap.N` — number of components per pixel
- `Pixmap.Colorspace` — ColorSpace of the pixmap

---

### Rect Class

Rectangle defined by `(x0, y0, x1, y1)` as two diagonally opposite points. `(x0, y0)` is the "top-left" and `(x1, y1)` is the "bottom-right" — but these may not match intuitive meanings in all coordinate systems.

---

### Shape Class

PDF only. Allows creating interconnected graphical elements on a PDF page. Methods mirror the corresponding `Page` drawing methods but are committed together on `Shape.Commit()`.

Usage pattern:
```csharp
Shape shape = page.NewShape();
shape.DrawRect(new Rect(10, 10, 100, 100));
shape.Finish(color: new float[]{1,0,0}, fill: new float[]{0,1,0}, width: 2);
shape.Commit();
```

---

### TextWriter Class

Used to write text content to a PDF page using a `Font` object.

```csharp
TextWriter tw = new TextWriter(page.Rect, opacity: 1.0f, color: new float[]{0,0,0});
tw.Append(new Point(50, 100), "Hello World", font, fontSize: 12);
tw.WriteText(page);
```

---

### Font Class

Represents a font for use with `TextWriter` and `Page.WriteText()`. Not connected to how fonts are used in `Page.InsertText()` or `Page.InsertTextbox()`.

```csharp
MuPDF.NET.Font font = new MuPDF.NET.Font("helv"); // Helvetica
MuPDF.NET.Font font = new MuPDF.NET.Font("");     // Noto Serif Regular (default)
```

Provides: font bbox, glyph count, glyph names, glyph bbox.

---

### Story Class

HTML/CSS-based content layout engine. Used to lay out text and images into a document.

- Access the DOM via `Story.Body` (an Xml node)
- Element positioning via a callback function
- See: https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Story.html

---

### Barcode Class

```csharp
// Class-based access
Barcode bc = new Barcode();

// Utility functions (also available via Utils)
var barcodes = Utils.ReadBarcodes(page);
Pixmap barcodePixmap = Utils.GetBarcodePixmap("content", BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE, 200, 200);
```

**BarcodeFormat** enum includes: QR_CODE, CODE_128, CODE_39, EAN_13, EAN_8, PDF_417, DATA_MATRIX, AZTEC, and others.

---

### Matrix Class

A transformation matrix for geometric operations.

```csharp
Matrix identity = new IdentityMatrix();       // No transformation
Matrix scaled = new Matrix(2, 2);             // 2x scale (144 DPI from 72 DPI base)
Matrix rotated = new Matrix(45);              // 45° rotation
Matrix translated = new Matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 10, 20); // Translate by (10, 20)
```

---

### ImageFilter and ImageFilterPipeline Classes

Apply transformations to images:
- `ImageFilter.GRAYSCALE` — convert to grayscale
- `ImageFilter.ROTATE_90`, `ROTATE_180`, `ROTATE_270`
- Chain filters: `ImageFilterPipeline.Add(filter)`

---

## Constants and Enumerations

### ColorSpace Constants

```csharp
ColorSpace csRGB  = ColorSpace(Utils.CS_RGB);   // CS_RGB = 1
ColorSpace csGRAY = ColorSpace(Utils.CS_GRAY);  // CS_GRAY = 2
ColorSpace csCMYK = ColorSpace(Utils.CS_CMYK);  // CS_CMYK = 3
```

### Version

```csharp
// VERSION: (mupdfnet_version, mupdf_version, timestamp)
// MUPDF_VERSION: (major, minor, patch)
```

### Document Permissions

| Code | Permitted Action |
|---|---|
| `PDF_PERM_PRINT` | Print the document |
| `PDF_PERM_MODIFY` | Modify the document's contents |
| `PDF_PERM_COPY` | Copy or otherwise extract text and graphics |
| `PDF_PERM_ANNOTATE` | Add or modify text annotations and interactive form fields |
| `PDF_PERM_FORM` | Fill in forms and sign the document |
| `PDF_PERM_ACCESSIBILITY` | Obsolete, always permitted |
| `PDF_PERM_ASSEMBLE` | Insert, rotate, or delete pages, bookmarks, thumbnail images |
| `PDF_PERM_PRINT_HQ` | High quality printing |

### PDF Optional Content Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `PDF_OC_ON` | Set an OCG to ON temporarily |
| `PDF_OC_TOGGLE` | Toggle OCG status temporarily |
| `PDF_OC_OFF` | Set an OCG to OFF temporarily |

### PDF Encryption Method Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `PDF_ENCRYPT_KEEP` | Do not change |
| `PDF_ENCRYPT_NONE` | Remove any encryption |
| `PDF_ENCRYPT_RC4_40` | RC4 40 bit |
| `PDF_ENCRYPT_RC4_128` | RC4 128 bit |
| `PDF_ENCRYPT_AES_128` | AES 128 bit |
| `PDF_ENCRYPT_AES_256` | AES 256 bit |
| `PDF_ENCRYPT_UNKNOWN` | Unknown |

### Inbuilt Fonts

| Reference | Font Name |
|---|---|
| `""` (empty) | Noto Serif Regular (default) |
| `"helv"` | Helvetica |
| `"heit"` | Helvetica-Oblique |
| `"hebo"` | Helvetica-Bold |
| `"hebi"` | Helvetica-BoldOblique |
| `"cour"` | Courier |
| `"coit"` | Courier-Oblique |
| `"cobo"` | Courier-Bold |
| `"cobi"` | Courier-BoldOblique |
| `"tiro"` | Times-Roman |
| `"tibo"` | Times-Bold |
| `"tiit"` | Times-Italic |
| `"tibi"` | Times-BoldItalic |
| `"symb"` | Symbol |
| `"zadb"` | ZapfDingbats |

### Text Alignment

| Constant | Value | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `TEXT_ALIGN_LEFT` | 0 | Left |
| `TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER` | 1 | Center |
| `TEXT_ALIGN_RIGHT` | 2 | Right |
| `TEXT_ALIGN_JUSTIFY` | 3 | Justify |

### Text Extraction Flags

| Flag | Value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `TEXT_PRESERVE_LIGATURES` | 1 | Pass ligatures through as-is (default: on) |
| `TEXT_PRESERVE_WHITESPACE` | 2 | Preserve whitespace characters (default: on) |
| `TEXT_PRESERVE_IMAGES` | 4 | Include images in TextPage (default: on for dict/html/etc.) |
| `TEXT_INHIBIT_SPACES` | 8 | Do not generate missing spaces (default: off) |
| `TEXT_DEHYPHENATE` | 16 | Join hyphenated line ends (used in search) |
| `TEXT_PRESERVE_SPANS` | 32 | One line per span |
| `TEXT_MEDIABOX_CLIP` | 64 | Ignore chars outside mediabox (default: on) |
| `TEXT_CID_FOR_UNKNOWN_UNICODE` | 128 | Use raw codes instead of U+FFFD (default: on) |

**Predefined flag combinations:**
- `TEXTFLAGS_TEXT` — for plain text extraction
- `TEXTFLAGS_WORDS` — for word-level extraction
- `TEXTFLAGS_BLOCKS` — for block-level extraction
- `TEXTFLAGS_DICT` / `TEXTFLAGS_RAWDICT` — includes images
- `TEXTFLAGS_HTML` / `TEXTFLAGS_XHTML` — includes images
- `TEXTFLAGS_XML` — no images
- `TEXTFLAGS_SEARCH` — includes dehyphenation

### Link Destination Kinds

| Code | Value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `LINK_NONE` | 0 | No destination (dummy link) |
| `LINK_GOTO` | 1 | Points to a place in this document |
| `LINK_URI` | 2 | Points to a URI |
| `LINK_LAUNCH` | 3 | Launch/open another file |
| `LINK_NAMED` | 4 | Points to a named location |
| `LINK_GOTOR` | 5 | Points to a place in another PDF |

### Font File Extensions

| Ext | Description |
|---|---|
| `ttf` | TrueType font |
| `pfa` | Postscript for ASCII font |
| `cff` | Type1C font (compressed Type1) |
| `cid` | Character identifier font (PostScript) |
| `otf` | OpenType font |
| `n/a` | Not extractable (Base-14, Type 3, etc.) |

---

## Utility Functions (Utils)

All accessible as static methods on the `Utils` class:

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `PaperSize(string name)` | Returns (width, height) of named paper size |
| `PaperRect(string name)` | Returns Rect for named paper size |
| `sRGB2Pdf(int srgb)` | Convert sRGB integer to PDF colour triple |
| `sRGB2Rgb(int srgb)` | Convert sRGB integer to RGB triple |
| `GlyphName2Unicode(string name)` | Glyph name to Unicode code point |
| `Unicode2GlyphName(int ch)` | Unicode code point to glyph name |
| `PlanishLine(Point p1, Point p2)` | Matrix mapping line to x-axis |
| `PaperSizes` | Dictionary of all known paper sizes |
| `GetPdfNow()` | Current date-time in PDF format |
| `GetTextLength(string text, string fontName, float fontSize)` | Text length in points |
| `GetPdfString(string s)` | Properly encoded PDF string |
| `GetImageProfile(byte[] stream)` | Image metadata from stream |
| `ConversionHeader(...)` / `ConversionTrailer(...)` | Text conversion helpers |
| `RecoverQuad(...)` / `RecoverCharQuad(...)` / `RecoverSpanQuad(...)` / `RecoverLineQuad(...)` | Recover quadrilaterals from text data |
| `INFINITE_QUAD()` / `INFINITE_RECT()` / `INFINITE_IRECT()` | Infinite geometry objects |
| `EMPTY_QUAD()` / `EMPTY_RECT()` / `EMPTY_IRECT()` | Empty geometry objects |
| `CalcImageMatrix(...)` | Compute image display matrix |
| `ColorCount(Pixmap pix, ...)` | Count distinct colours in pixmap |
| `GetTables(Page page, ...)` | Extract tables from a page |
| `GetTextWithLayout(Page page, ...)` | Extract text preserving layout |
| `GetWidgetProperties(Widget w)` | Get widget/form field properties |
| `ReadBarcodes(Page page)` | Read barcodes from a page |
| `WriteBarcode(...)` | Write barcode to page |
| `GetBarcodePixmap(string content, BarcodeFormat format, ...)` | Generate barcode as Pixmap |
| `ReplaceBytes(byte[] src, byte[] find, byte[] replace)` | Replace bytes in byte array |
| `MeasureString(string text, ...)` | Measure string dimensions |
| `GetAllContents(Page page)` | Get all content streams of a page |
| `InsertContents(Page page, byte[] data, int xref)` | Insert content stream |
| `GetFontProperties(...)` | Get font properties |
| `GetColors(...)` | Named colour lookup |
| `GetColorInfoList()` | List of all named colours |

---

## Migration from ByteScout SDK

### Setting Up

```csharp
// ByteScout
using Bytescout.PDFExtractor;

// MuPDF.NET
using MuPDF.NET;
```

### Loading a Document

```csharp
// ByteScout
TextExtractor textExtractor = new TextExtractor();
textExtractor.LoadDocumentFromFile("sample.pdf");

// MuPDF.NET
Document doc = new Document("sample.pdf");
```

### Extracting Text

```csharp
// ByteScout
string extractedText = textExtractor.GetText();
Console.WriteLine(extractedText);

// MuPDF.NET
Document doc = new Document("sample.pdf");
Page page = doc[0];
foreach (var textBlock in page.GetTextBlocks())
    Console.WriteLine(textBlock.Text);
```

### Converting a Page to an Image

```csharp
// ByteScout
RasterRenderer renderer = new RasterRenderer();
renderer.LoadDocumentFromFile("sample.pdf");
renderer.Save("sample.png", RasterImageFormat.PNG, 0, 75);

// MuPDF.NET
Document doc = new Document("sample.pdf");
Page page = doc[0];
Matrix mat = new Matrix(2, 2); // Adjust scale as needed
Pixmap pix = page.GetPixmap(matrix: mat);
pix.Save("sample.png");
```
